SEQUENCE.NAME: $null
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: No certificates are expirying for next 15 days

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Prepare docuement list with certificate details

LOOP.COMMENT: Fetch all partner and certifciate details
Fetch contacts from profile and form a string

INVOKE.COMMENT: Grouping documents based on serial number

LOOP.COMMENT: ignore partner records with same certifciate serial number

Values.value:
Hi Team,

The below %Environment% certificate for Partner %/outCert/partnername% is expirying as per mentioned date at OneHub WM end.

Kindly provide us the latest certificate and also the exact date and time to update at our end.

Serial Number Usage Expiry Date Delivery URL
%/outCert/serialNumber% %/outCert/usage% %/outCert/expirationDate% %/outCert/Protocol% :: %/outCert/Host%:%/outCert/Port%%/outCert/Location%

This is an automated email . For questions , kindly reach out to OneHubWMsupport@atos.net 


Thank you!
OneHub wM Support

INVOKE.COMMENT: sends enail to external partners in the profile

Values.value: Partner Certifciate Expiry Alert Errored out
